---
title: "Suzanne Voice Assistant: Senior Project Journal"
listing:
  - id: posts
    contents:
      - posts/activity
      - posts/reflection
      - posts/feedback
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    fields: [title, date, description, categories, word-count, image]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

## Posts

:::{#posts}
:::
